parts.label: Engine-to-PDK Adapter / Bellhousing Interface
parts.function: Adapter plate and bellhousing interface that mates the flat-six engine block to the PDK transaxle, aligning input shaft and locating the dual-clutch housing.

parts.label: Engine Mounts x2 — Hydraulic Rubber Mounts
parts.function: Pair of hydraulic rubber engine mounts, one on each side of the mid-mounted flat-six, that isolate engine vibration from the chassis and carry vertical and lateral engine loads.

parts.label: PDK / Transmission Mount
parts.function: Hydraulic rubber mount that supports the tail of the PDK transaxle against the rear subframe, isolating driveline torque reaction and vibration from the chassis.

parts.label: Lug Bolts M14x1.5 Ball-Seat x20
parts.function: Set of 20 M14x1.5 ball-seat lug bolts (5 per wheel) that secure all four wheels to the Porsche hub flanges at the specified torque.
